nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联749种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等749种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 尼加拉瓜
nodes.summary: 尼加拉瓜是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联124种鸟类，包括山冠雉、Yucatan bobwhite、Spot-bellied bobwhite等124种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 常綠森林
nodes.summary: 常綠森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联442种鸟类，包括紫冠雉、角冠雉、Razor-billed curassow等442种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Emerald tanager
nodes.summary: Emerald tanager（Emerald tanager，学名 Tangara florida），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于常綠森林、次生林、尼加拉瓜，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The emerald tanager mainly inhabits humid lowland forest, montane evergreen forest, and secondary forest at elevations of but can be found from

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The emerald tanager mainly inhabits humid lowland forest, montane evergreen forest, and secondary forest at elevations of but can be found from

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It may also be found in extreme southern Nicaragua

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is listed as being of least concern by the International Union for Conservation of Nature (IUCN) on the IUCN Red List due to its sufficiently large range and a lack of significant population decline, but is threatened by habitat destruction

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: However, its population, which is thought to be between 40,000 and 499,999 mature birds, is currently decreasing. The species is threatened by habitat destruction and is already suffering locally due to deforestation
